title: Worst Evangelion Related Thing Ever
wikitext:
[]: Worst Evangelion-Related Thing Ever             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 03, 2008 10:15 pm I'd like to see what people consider to be the worst (lowest-quality, overall terrible) Evangelion -related thing that, if Anno were dead, would have him turning over in his grave (if he were to also consider it to be as bad). The item must be official, so Re-Take and other doujins don't count. I nominate Evangelion VOX . Though it has some good songs ("Komm Susser Tod: Tumbling Down Mix"), overall it's laughably bad. The song "The Image of Me" not only concerns itself primarily with a cliche concept, but is full of hilariously terrible pseudophilosophical questions that appear to be trying way too had to sound "deep", but could be easily answered with a second's thought. "Armageddon" has such corny lines as "We gotta wake up now before it's much too late / Hungry people need food on their plate" and "And you don't even stop to think / Whatever happened to the dinosaurs could make us all extinct". And, of course, "But don't have a breakdown / 'Cause I called you a clown / You threw a punch and missed / I killed you with a kiss". Not to mention that it's a rap version of "Pachelbel's Canon" . All in all, VOX makes me quite glad Loren & Mash had very little to do with the actual show (and the one song they used for the movie, "Thanatos: If I Can't Be Yours" was their best).

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Aug 03, 2008 10:17 pm Anything that has to do with the fans would have Anno turn in his grave.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 03, 2008 10:21 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Anything that has to do with the fans would have Anno turn in his grave.

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Mon Aug 04, 2008 7:13 am Episodes 25 + 26!

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Aug 04, 2008 7:46 am chazthesilencer wrote: Episodes 25 + 26!

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Mon Aug 04, 2008 10:20 pm Nigouki's design during EoE? I thought it was terrible; she looked nothing like what she looked like in the earlier episodes. Looked more like a harpy. If anything, Nigouki should've looked the most badass in that scene. I liked the fight and Asuka's epiphany and demise and everything, just that eva-02 looked bad when instead she should've looked the best.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Aug 04, 2008 11:20 pm LCL orange juice Lance of Longinus forks Rei Ayanami dinner sets (I couldn't POSSIBLY make any of this shit up, swear to god.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Aug 05, 2008 12:03 pm That dinner plate which is supposed to resemble Lilith Rei/Asuka fireworks (no, not like that! It was a box of fireworks with pictures of Rei and Asuka on the cover--minds like sewers, you've got...)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Aug 05, 2008 3:12 pm A certain renowned statesman would have wrote: The worst thing related to Evangelion is Evangelion itself!

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Aug 05, 2008 3:59 pm Shinji Doritos. Not that they're Shinji-flavored, but that notion makes my skin crawl.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Aug 05, 2008 4:31 pm The official Rei and Asuka mini-fridges were pretty bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Tue Aug 05, 2008 4:54 pm chee wrote: Shinji Doritos. Not that they're Shinji-flavored, but that notion makes my skin crawl.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 05, 2008 4:57 pm Probably they just taste like mayo.

[]: Re: Worst Evangelion-Related Thing Ever             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue Aug 05, 2008 5:02 pm NAveryW wrote: I'd like to see what people consider to be the worst (lowest-quality, overall terrible) Evangelion -related thing that, if Anno were dead, would have him turning over in his grave (if he were to also consider it to be as bad). The item must be official, so Re-Take and other doujins don't count. I nominate Evangelion VOX . Though it has some good songs ("Komm Susser Tod: Tumbling Down Mix"), overall it's laughably bad. The song "The Image of Me" not only concerns itself primarily with a cliche concept, but is full of hilariously terrible pseudophilosophical questions that appear to be trying way too had to sound "deep", but could be easily answered with a second's thought. "Armageddon" has such corny lines as "We gotta wake up now before it's much too late / Hungry people need food on their plate" and "And you don't even stop to think / Whatever happened to the dinosaurs could make us all extinct". And, of course, "But don't have a breakdown / 'Cause I called you a clown / You threw a punch and missed / I killed you with a kiss". Not to mention that it's a rap version of "Pachelbel's Canon" . All in all, VOX makes me quite glad Loren & Mash had very little to do with the actual show (and the one song they used for the movie, "Thanatos: If I Can't Be Yours" was their best).

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Aug 05, 2008 5:24 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Probably they just taste like mayo.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Tue Aug 05, 2008 5:33 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Probably they just taste like mayo.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Aug 06, 2008 7:15 pm Does Angelic days count as being official? If so it gets my vote, if not I think I'll go with all the product placements in the new rebvuild movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 06, 2008 8:07 pm With Vox, at least that funk Version of Komm Susser Tod is pretty good. Don't forget they also have a rap version of Air (Can't find the name right now) on that CD. But yeah, Vox is pretty bad. From what I've seen, I think the worst Eva-related thing out there is all those Asuka & Rei nekkid sex-dolls out there. -_-; Okay, so they're not sex dolls, it's just kinda sickening how some of the figures can be wearing really slutty clothes. The real Asuka and Rei would never dress so crappy (Misato, maybe for Kaji ;) ).

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Wed Aug 06, 2008 8:49 pm Oh yeah, there was that Asuka on a toilet figurine. Particularly something I would want to avoid.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 06, 2008 8:59 pm That was made by a fan or something though. The actual figure is (thank god) just Asuka sitting on against this wall at school.
summary: []: Worst Evangelion-Related Thing Ever             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 03, 2008 10:15 pm I'd like to see what people consider to be the worst (lowest-quality, overall terrible) Evangelion -related thing that, if Anno were dead, would have him turning over in his grave (if he were to also consider it to be as bad). The item must be official, so Re-Take and other doujins don't count. I nominate Evangelion
